title: suppression via waiver.vlt does not work
body:
Thank you for providing such a useful tool. I noticed some strange behavior while using Verilator, so I wanted to let you know.

## Summary
The `-Wno-EOFNEWLINE` command-line option in Verilator successfully suppresses the warning, but suppression via waiver.vlt does not work.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Create a file `aaa.sv` with the following content (no newline at end):
   ```
   module aaa; endmodule
   ```

2. Create a waiver.vlt file with the following content:
   ```
   `verilator_config

   lint_off -rule EOFNEWLINE -file "*aaa.sv" -match "Missing newline at end of file (POSIX 3.206).*"
   ```

3. Run the following command:
   ```
   verilator --lint-only -Wall waiver.vlt aaa.sv
   ```

## Expected Behavior
The EOFNEWLINE warning should be suppressed by the `lint_off` setting in waiver.vlt.

## Actual Behavior
The warning is not suppressed and results in the following error output:
```
verilator --lint-only -Wall  waiver.vlt aaa.sv
%Warning-EOFNEWLINE: aaa.sv:1:22: Missing newline at end of file (POSIX 3.206).
                                : ... Suggest add newline.
    1 | module aaa; endmodule
      |                      ^
                     ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/EOFNEWLINE?v=5.040
                     ... Use "/* verilator lint_off EOFNEWLINE */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
```

## Additional Notes
- The `-Wno-EOFNEWLINE` command-line option correctly suppresses the warning.
- `hexdump -C aaa.sv` confirms that the file does not end with a newline character.
- The waiver.vlt file was written based on the suggestions recorded in out.vlt. ( --waiver-output out.vlt )
- verilator --version
Verilator 5.040 2025-08-30 rev v5.040-50-g0a9d9db5a
code_blocks:
`verilator_config

   lint_off -rule EOFNEWLINE -file "*aaa.sv" -match "Missing newline at end of file (POSIX 3.206).*"

verilator --lint-only -Wall  waiver.vlt aaa.sv
%Warning-EOFNEWLINE: aaa.sv:1:22: Missing newline at end of file (POSIX 3.206).
                                : ... Suggest add newline.
    1 | module aaa; endmodule
      |                      ^
                     ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/EOFNEWLINE?v=5.040
                     ... Use "/* verilator lint_off EOFNEWLINE */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
